name: Citizen NFTs
headline: Mint the founding Citizens of Alpha City
tagline: A 1,690-piece NFT collection celebrating the founding Citizens of Alpha City.
description: Citizen NFTs blend bold city-inspired artwork with collectible traits across the founding Alpha City drop. Explore the previews below, review the mint schedule, and get your wallet ready for launch.
mintNote: Each Citizen features a unique combination of traits. Connect your wallet now so you're ready as soon as minting opens.

contract.message: Minting for Citizen NFTs is not live yet. Follow Alpha City for the public launch announcement.

phases.name: Allowlist
phases.description: Guaranteed access for the earliest Citizens supporters and curated wallets.

phases.name: Priority
phases.description: A first-come phase for any remaining Citizens after the allowlist window closes.

phases.name: Public
phases.description: Any unminted Citizens open to the public once the private windows complete.
